use_cases: Toggle a single boolean setting or feature on and off.
Select one option from a group of mutually exclusive choices in a form.
Switch between view modes or display options in an interface.
Filter or segment content selection in navigation or dashboards.
Enable or disable features in settings panels.
ai_summary: A lightweight toggle button component built with react-aria-components for accessibility, supporting default and outline variants with three size options. Features standard interaction states including hover, selected, disabled, and focus-visible indicators using Tailwind CSS data attributes. Designed as a reusable atomic component that can function standalone or within a ToggleButtonGroup for multi-option selection scenarios.
